name: Ezra Pound
abstract: Ezra Weston Loomis Pound (30 October 1885 – 1 November 1972) was an American poet and critic, a major figure in the early modernist poetry movement, and a collaborator in Fascist Italy and the Salò Republic during World War II. His works include Ripostes (1912), Hugh Selwyn Mauberley (1920), and The Cantos (c.

about_quotes.speaker: Albert Murray
about_quotes.evidence: And I knew about Ezra Pound and people like that at Hamilton.
about_quotes.doc_title: Albert Murray interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, September 24, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Hentoff Nat

about_quotes.speaker: A.B. Spellman
about_quotes.evidence: Pound, Ezra Pound who I don’t like to quote but sometimes do, once said that it was referred to a cycle.
